description: Style Noteipanema draws inspiration from the Brazilian beach of Ipanema - it's design references the trend-setting seaside style. It takes highway fashion and mixes it with beach-bound cool. A vacay-ready look demands a pair like these lovely, colour pop flip flops. We recommend you snag more than one of these - need more reasons to buy? Supermodel Gisele Bundchen is the face of the brand!Product DetailsBranded blue rubber thong straps with a heart at the apex of the strapsCurved, textured rubber footbed in blue with hearts printSingle piece outsole with grooves, upraised at the heelMaterial and careRubberWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
